headline: Arta Finance Launches Arta AI: AI-Guided Private Wealth Platform
the_so_what: The B2B 'Wealth as a Service' play is the real story here. Arta is not just competing with private banks for end clients; it is offering to become the AI layer inside those banks. Ralph Hamers' involvement (he ran both UBS and ING) gives the platform direct credibility in exactly the boardrooms where B2B deals get signed. At $20/month retail, the consumer product looks like a distribution funnel for the enterprise sale.
summary: Arta Finance launched Arta AI, an AI-powered private wealth platform built around three specialized agents: an Investment Planner that creates personalized financial plans, a Product Specialist for platform navigation, and a Research Analyst for stock analysis. The platform supports both voice and text interaction. Pricing starts at $20/month, with free access for clients with $100K or more in assets. CEO Caesar Sengupta leads the company, with Ralph Hamers (former CEO of UBS and ING) as senior advisor. Arta also introduced a 'Wealth as a Service' B2B offering targeting banks. The company reports thousands of accredited investors globally.

key_stat.label: entry price for AI wealth platform (free for $100K+ clients)
